en: That is a very good point, Dwight. Make a right turn.
Wait, wait, wait. No, no, no. It means bear right.
ko: 잠깐, 잠깐, 잠깐. 아니, 아니, 아니. 오른쪽으로 가라는 뜻이야. 저기 위로.

en: No, it said right. It said take a right.
No, no, no. No, look. It means go up to the right, bear right over the bridge and hook up with 307.
ko: 오른쪽으로 올라가서, 다리 건너서 307과 연결되는 거야.

en: Maybe it's a shortcut, Dwight. It said go to the right.
ko: 아마 지름길일 거야, 드와이트. 오른쪽으로 가라고 했어.

en: It can't mean that. There's a lake there.
ko: 그럴 리가 없어. 거기 호수가 있어.

en: The machine knows where it is going. The machine knows. This is the lake. This is the lake.
ko: 기계가 어디로 가는지 알아. 기계가 알아.

en: Stop yelling at me. No, it's up there. There's no road here.
ko: 아니, 저기 위에 있고 여기 도로가 없어.

en: Remain calm. I have trained for this.
Okay. Exit the window. Here we go.
Make a U-turn, if possible. Look out for leeches.
Michael, are you okay? Swim for it.
I got you. I got you. Get up. Get up.
Michael. Michael. Let go. Let go of me.
I'm a woman. I got you. I got you.
